name: Irene Martínez
description: '''Irene Martínez Mejía'''{{family name footnote|Martínez|Mejía|lang=Spanish}} (1923–1993), also known as '''La Niña Irene''', was a Colombian [[bullerengue]] singer and songwriter. She was the lead singer of the group Los Soneros de Gamero for 13 years, with whom she helped to popularise bullerengue as a commercially successful genre in Colombia.
